ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the country (e.g., USA, GBR, CHN) */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* GDP of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event took place */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., summer, winter) */,
  "host_city" TEXT /* City that hosted the event */,
  "host_country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country that hosted the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_host_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medals" (
  "medal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medal */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the medal was awarded in */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the medal was awarded to */,
  "medal_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medal type (e.g., gold, silver, bronze) */,
  "medal_count" INTEGER /* Number of medals awarded */,
  "athletes_involved" INTEGER /* Number of athletes involved in the event */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport in which the medal was awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medals_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medals_medal_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("medal_type_id") REFERENCES medal_types ("medal_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medals_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medal_types" (
  "medal_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medal type */,
  "medal_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the medal type */,
  "medal_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the medal type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_countries" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country participating in the event */,
  "participation_status" TEXT /* Status of the country's participation in the event (e.g., 'active', ' inactive') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medal_counts" (
  "medal_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medal count */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "total_medals" INTEGER /* Total number of medals awarded to the country in the event */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medal count was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medal_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medal_counts_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medal_counts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_medals" (
  "country_medal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country medal count */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "total_gold" INTEGER /* Total number of gold medals awarded to the country */,
  "total_silver" INTEGER /* Total number of silver medals awarded to the country */,
  "total_bronze" INTEGER /* Total number of bronze medals awarded to the country */,
  "total_medals" INTEGER /* Total number of medals awarded to the country */,
  "average_medals_per_event" TEXT /* Average number of medals awarded to the country per event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_medal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_medals_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country by total medal count */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "rank_description" TEXT /* Description of the ranking (e.g., 'Top 10', 'Bottom 5') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_medals" (
  "athlete_medal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete medal */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "medal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medal awarded */,
  "medal_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medal type (e.g., gold, silver, bronze) */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event in which the medal was awarded */,
  "medal_date" TEXT /* Date the medal was awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_medal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_medals_medal_id FOREIGN KEY ("medal_id") REFERENCES medals ("medal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_medals_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_medals_medal_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("medal_type_id") REFERENCES medal_types ("medal_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_medals_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the athlete represents */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport in which the athlete participates */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event in which the athlete participates */,
  "athlete_description" TEXT /* Description of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "sport_description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_sports" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport featured in the event */,
  "event_sport_description" TEXT /* Description of the event-sport association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "sport_id")
)
